childhood.familyBackground: A German billionaire businessman, he is known for his leadership in the real estate industry. Alexander Otto built his wealth through inherited assets, with a net worth of $6.7 billion.
childhood.familyBackgroundKo: Alexander Otto는 포브스 2026년 억만장자 순위 528위입니다. 여기에서 Alexander Otto의 경력, 자산 요약 등에 대해 자세히 알아보세요.
childhood.education: Details of Alexander Otto's education are not widely documented in public sources.
childhood.educationKo: Alexander Otto의 교육 세부사항은 공개 자료에서 널리 기록되지 않음.
childhood.earlyLife: Alexander Otto built a career in Real estate.
childhood.earlyLifeKo: Alexander Otto은(는) Real estate 분야에서 경력을 쌓음.
